title: rubus × deductus
intro: Rubus × deductus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or raspberry-blackberry, is a cross between the raspberry and blackberry species, combining the desirable traits of both plants. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × deductus include its potential to support cardiovascular health, improve cognitive function, and provide antioxidant protection, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Rubus × deductus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
